mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.user_id, COALESCE(mu.nickname, mu.username) AS user_name, b.coach_id, COALESCE(cd.real_name, cu.nickname, cu.username) AS coach_name, b.booking_date, b.start_time, b.end_time, b.note, b.status FROM fitness_private_coach_booking b LEFT JOIN sys_user mu ON mu.id = b.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user cu ON cu.id = b.coach_id LEFT JOIN coach_detail cd ON cd.user_id = cu.id WHERE b.id = #{id} AND b.deleted = false

SELECT b.id, b.user_id, COALESCE(mu.nickname, mu.username) AS user_name, b.coach_id, COALESCE(cd.real_name, cu.nickname, cu.username) AS coach_name, b.booking_date, b.start_time, b.end_time, b.note, b.status FROM fitness_private_coach_booking b LEFT JOIN sys_user mu ON mu.id = b.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user cu ON cu.id = b.coach_id LEFT JOIN coach_detail cd ON cd.user_id = cu.id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND b.deleted = false ORDER BY b.booking_date DESC, b.start_time ASC

SELECT b.id, b.user_id, COALESCE(mu.nickname, mu.username) AS user_name, b.coach_id, COALESCE(cd.real_name, cu.nickname, cu.username) AS coach_name, b.booking_date, b.start_time, b.end_time, b.note, b.status FROM fitness_private_coach_booking b LEFT JOIN sys_user mu ON mu.id = b.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user cu ON cu.id = b.coach_id LEFT JOIN coach_detail cd ON cd.user_id = cu.id WHERE b.coach_id = #{coachId} AND b.booking_date = #{date} AND b.deleted = false ORDER BY b.start_time ASC

SELECT b.id, b.user_id, COALESCE(mu.nickname, mu.username) AS user_name, b.coach_id, COALESCE(cd.real_name, cu.nickname, cu.username) AS coach_name, b.booking_date, b.start_time, b.end_time, b.note, b.status FROM fitness_private_coach_booking b LEFT JOIN sys_user mu ON mu.id = b.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user cu ON cu.id = b.coach_id LEFT JOIN coach_detail cd ON cd.user_id = cu.id WHERE b.coach_id = #{coachId} AND b.booking_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND b.deleted = false ORDER BY b.booking_date ASC, b.start_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE fitness_private_coach_booking SET status = 2, cancel_reason = #{reason}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
UPDATE fitness_private_coach_booking SET status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
